en: Complete a run - your name in the Hall of Fame.
Take the stairs down for the first time.
Throw an item for the first time.
Fire a wand for the first time.
This device magically increases the wielder's accuracy.
You can't be hurt by fire while wearing this.
This device weakens hostile magic before it can affect the wearer.
Magically warded, this device protects the user from physical hurt.
An enchantment on this device causes the wielder to do more damage.
This amulet helps you act faster.
This device magically increases the wielder's ability to avoid attacks.
While using this, you have both extra accuracy and exta evasion
This weapon burns with magical fire.
The air is chilly around this cold-infused weapon.
This amulet helps you move around faster.
This device renders you immune to poisons.
This deluxe armor protects you from blows, magic, and even fire and poison.
This weapon can help knock foes away from you and into each other.
Sparks crackle from this lightning-infused weapon.
Dripping with toxic fluids, this weapon poisons its wielder's foes.
This device protects you from fire and poison.
This exotic weapon burns with a magic flame that empowers your wands.
This weapon strikes with the power of a thunderclap.
A brutally damaging weapon that hits extra hard an accurately.
Incoming magic and fire damage is reduced.
Open wound - losing HP each turn until it clots.
Cannot move or act. Damage chips the ice away.
Can see mobs through walls, but not their HP bars or names.
Harder to hit, but attacking cancels the effect.
Can't cast haste again until this wears off.
Can't cast heal again until this wears off.
Hidden from enemies. Moving or attacking will cancel this.
The whole level layout is revealed at the start of every turn.
Harder to hit, but attacking cancels the effect.
Unaffected by ground hazards and pits.
Losing HP each turn until it burns out.
Moving at blinding speed. Ends on taking or dealing damage.
Losing HP each turn until the poison wears off.
Can't use ranged attacks until this wears off.
Immune to all incoming damage until it wears off.
Your next spell or potion is empowered.
Needs to eat soon or start taking damage.
Can't teleport again until this wears off.
Fragile, but carries the amulet of light.
Hardy fighter with sword and scale mail.
Path interrupted: a {mob} comes into view.
Ranged enemies such as *imps* can be a pain.  There are a lot of ways to deal with them.
You could close the distance with them, use something like *smoke* to prevent them from shooting, or *grapple* them and pull them close.
Or you could trick them into shooting *their own allies*?
The common orange *cat* is a frequent visitor to the dungeon.
Legend has it that these creatures can be powerful allies if treated well.
Cats sometimes bring their *kittens* into the dungeon.
Leveling up is done by collecting *orbs*, not by killing enemies for xp
A blue, shield shaped gem in a gold setting.
An intricate sign traced in silver, it seems to aid your precision in combat.
A pale gem set in silver, it shines brightly.
Light can change how creatures and plants act.
A complex magical token that helps you move faster.
A grey, unremarkable amulet to look at.
Protects from magical and energy attacks.
Ants make this ultra nourishing jelly, as healthy as it is revolting.
A heavy iron sphere full of magical powder.
Damages and pushes away everything around the point of impact.
A very lifelike small enamel frog -- or is it a real frog staying very still?
Use it from a quickslot to jump rapidly away from or toward your foes.
This nasty, underhanded weapon is permanently coated in poison.
Creates poison clouds on the target.
A lacquered ball with a spring-loaded brass hinge and a hungry little click.
Throw it at a creature to trap it inside. Throw a full one to release its occupant.
It protects you somewhat against physical attacks.
A fragment of intrinsic power to add to yourself.
A scrap of magical energy for your items.
A heavy, brutal sword that can block a good deal of damage
Hits hard, knocks back, protects  a bit -- nice.
A short bladed dagger, a classic weapon.
Not especially deadly but strikes rapidly.
On impact, deals damage and ignites tiles around the target.
So tasty that a stray cat or dog you throw it to will follow you for the rest of its life.
A rotting, disgusting gob of mystery meat.
There are probably particularly vile creatures that would be glad to be given this.
A frosted vial that shatters into a numbing burst.
Chills enemies for a long time, delays their next action, and extinguishes flames.
A very lifelike small enamel frog -- or is it a real frog staying very still?
Use it from a quickslot to jump rapidly away from or toward your foes.
A multicolored enamel frog -- or is it a real frog staying very still?
Use it from a quickslot to jump rapidly away from or toward your foes.
A hook on a strong rope.
Can pull enemies -- smaller ones, at least -- toward you.
It doesn't work instantly, it helps you regenerate over time.
Thick plates of steel encase your body.
Lots of protection against physical attack, at the cost of speed.
Ipwergis-pudding is a magically delectable food with many powers.
Grants insights if eaten; magical creatures might be very pleased to be given it.
A jade crab carved in perfect detail, its claws raised in a warding gesture.
Invoke to wrap yourself in a momentary shell of jade light.
A peaceful green fish carved from jade, cool and smooth in the hand.
Hold the fish and you pass through the world like a blur.
A sturdy kite shield offering good protection.
A glass sphere of dark oil. Shatters and slicks the floor on impact.
A surprisingly common and nutritious food.
A long elegant pear, reportedly the kind eaten at high meetings.
A specially ripe pear, dripping with juice. Five times more filling than the ordinary kind.
A pear with skin that shimmers like polished silver. Mysterious.
A fizzy potion that seems to weigh nothing.
The drinker becomes briefly ethereal and can pass through walls.
A clear potion that crackles faintly.
Reveals the layout of the entire level on a draught.
A clear potion that hides the imbiber from sight for a short while.
A glutinous potion that seems made of eyeballs.
Allows the drinker to percieve distant creatures.
A sickly green elixir. Vile to drink, devastating to throw.
If thrown, creates a puff of poison vapor.
A glittering brew that infuses the drinker with magical energy.
Increases the power of wands while its effects are active.
A sphere of power that makes you stronger.
A fine dagger capable of slicing a foe to ribbons.
Often manages to get right past a foe's armor plates.
Rapiers do moderate damage but you can attack more often with them.
Rapiers do moderate damage but you can attack more often with them.
Overlapping iron scales on a leather backing.
It protects you fairly well against physical attacks.
Protects a bit against physical damage.
A ball of tightly coiled wire that can release powerful current.
Lighting bolts arc from foe to foe, doing extra damage to wet targets.
A black glass bomb packed with smoldering chemicals.
Shatters into a thick cloud of sight-blocking smoke.
A plain iron blade, friend of many an adventurer.
As well as decent damage, it's heavy enough to knock smaller enemies back a bit.
A plump pink chunk of tasty meat.
This well balanced knife can be thrown from some way off.
Minor magic helps it return to its thrower -- a bit.
A blazing torch that casts bright light all around.
Lights up the area, potentially changing how creatures and plants behave.  Also helps you go a bit faster.
This powerful magical vine wraps itself around a foe, allowing you to haul them nearer.
Can pull enemies -- even quite large ones -- toward you.
A powerful bomb that draws in matter, creating a void.
Destroys floors and pulls creatures toward it.
A glass vial of magically compressed water.
Gushes water everywhere, washing smaller creatures back.
A wand bound in tarnished silver and tipped with flickering crystals.
This specialized wand can instantly banish creatures that are not really real.
A blackened iron wand inlaid with red runes. Detonates the target tile in a ball of fire.
Blows the target location to smithereens.
A wand decorated with a small animal head.
Summons a loyal dog to protect you.
A blackened wand crackling with embers. Ignites the target.
Spreads fire around the target point
Causes mushrooms to grow at the target area.
A green wand bound with vine.
Engenders vegetation at the target point.
A wand that crackles with energy.
Effect jumps from target to target and is stronger in water -- beware.
A short wand topped with a pale chip of crystal.
Sends out a magical bolt that does moderate damage.
A dark wand slick to the touch.
Creates a layer of oil at the target location.
A wand that constantly shifts and changes.
Can turn a creature into something else.
A pale blue wand that drips with water.
Creates a pool of water at the target location.
apply a magical effect to the target area
create an explosion at the target
ignite a fireball at the target
chill and delay the target area
coax mushrooms up from the target
shock the target and nearby creatures
strike a single target for direct damage
spread a layer of oil across the target area
release a poison cloud at the target
reshape the target area - rerolls floor tiles and transforms nearby creatures into similarly-sized kin
release a smoke cloud at the target
tear a void at the target - pulls nearby creatures in and crumbles the ground
create a pool of water at the target
recharge every wand in your bag
Glows on the floor with an attention-catching twinkle.
Bounces back to the throwers feet after striking.
Throwing this at a {mobs} tames it.
Can be eaten to restore satiety.
Aim and {verb} to yank the contents of the target tile to your side.
Aim and {verb} to leap to a chosen tile within range.
Aim and {verb} to summon a {mob} at your side.
A fierce barbarian princess, fearless and pursuing her own goals
A large, menacing bat. It flutters around in the shadows, its eyes glowing with malevolent intent.
A proud ant worker, far superior to its red ant foes.
A colony of black ants has broken through into the dungeon here, intent on extracting resources.
A small, skittering mouse with a fiery disposition.
A large, unpleasant creature. It oozes across the floor, consuming everything in its path.
The Prodigy might once have been a soldier bug, but it has evolved into something disturbingly humanoid.
A sleek and agile cat, always on the prowl for its next meal.  Mice beware.
A white cat from old Ireland that is an expert at catching mice.
An imp of unusual size, hiding itself behind a leering mask.
A loyal and fierce dog, trained to hunt and protect.
A twisted piece of cloth that adopts a malevolent form, ethereal yet all too real.
Far, far bigger than imps are supposed to be, you dread to imagine what might be hidden beneath that ornate mask.
A towering, nightmarish creature of malice and hunger.  Stories say that if you run away it will simply reappear at your side.
A large, revolting, indiscriminately predatory creature, capable of spawning further horrible blobs when fed enough flesh.
A small kitten that looks up to its parent cat.  You can only hope it survives long enough to grow up.
A heavyset, scaly humanoid hefting a battered meat-cleaver. The blade looks plenty capable of finding the gaps in plate.
A small, scaly humanoid wielding a crude blade. It hisses at you with malice.
A tall, scaly humanoid in worn ceremonial plate. He barks orders to his kin and raises a glowing standard.
A scaly humanoid clutching a bundle of crude spears. It hangs back from the fight, looking for a clear throw.
An imp that hides its identity behind a grotesque mask.  It's slightly larger and stronger than its smaller kin.
A loathsome bug. This cockroach-like creature has few redeeming features.  It's not very strong.
What twisted this huge dog into such a malevolent and brutal form?
A small, hostile creature hiding behind a rudimentary mask.
A small, skittering mouse. It's timid and tends to flee from you.
What threats and lies drew him here?  Or is this just what he does?
A stunted orc whose misshapen body can contain only evil.
Why is he here?  Why is he shooting at you?  Does he even know?
A feline horror bent on violence.  MAYBE it's on your side.
Fragile, but carries the amulet of light.
Hardy fighter with sword and scale mail.
A mangy rat with too many teeth. Slightly tougher than a roach but no scarier.
A proud ant worker, far superior to its black ant foes.
A colony of red ants has broken through into the dungeon here, intent on extracting resources.
A soldier bug. This insect has a glossy carapace and razor-sharp pincers.  It's stronger than it looks.
A small, skittering spider. It could well be poisonous.  It's certainly fast moving.
Far nastier than its ordinary doombat brethren, it wants to suck your blood.
A bug that evolved into a humanoid -- but something went wrong.
A particularly horrid imp, this one capers and leers while still hiding behind its unpleasant mask.
A twisted piece of cloth whose mouth opens wider... and wider...
This must be an imp -- but it's grown to insane proportions and moves with terrifying speed.
This kobold looks a lot stronger, a lot crazier, and a lot more dangerous than the rest.
This kobold is a lot tougher than the others, and seems to have a six pack.  Is... this... Sparta??
A kobold ruler, decked in gold and jewels.
Somehow, this otherwise harmless kobold has got hold of a crude firearm, which it uses to dominate its kin.
An imp that hides its identity behind a grotesque mask.  This one has grown really quite large and seems more independent.
This cockroach like creature seethes with a malevolent intelligence.
A small, hostile creature hiding behind a rudimentary mask.  This particular one seems to be a bit bolder than the others.
This rat sees itself as an adventurer, but it's just as mangy and disease-ridden as the others.
A highly experienced insect, veteran of many tough fights.
A revolting spider laden with venom.
A prowling wolf, looking for flesh.
Suddenly appears at the side of an enemy{cooldown}
This otherwordly being is vulnerable to being Banished.
By devouring corpses, this creature can spawn further beings.
On death, this creature explodes in fire.
This creature is immune to fire.
This creatures hits ignite tiles around the target.
Feasting on mushrooms causes this creature to breed explosively.
This creature does not frighten easily.
This creatures venomous attacks poison the foe.
This terrifying being frightens nearby susceptible creatures.
Can send out servants to do its bidding.
This is not necessarily a hostile creature.
This creature has a ranged attack with damage {range}
Sees for {vision} tiles, may wake if foe within {wake} tiles.
This creature is huge in size.
This creature can attack rather quickly.
This creatures attacks are rather slow.
+1 bomb effective level per perk level.
+2 throw range and x0.75 throw action cost per level.
Move to any tile within 2 squares for one moveCost.
On kill: -20% attack/move cost for 10 turns.
+1 square of melee knockback per level.
Enemy wake radius and vision halved against you.
Tap a slot to choose an ingredient.
This removes the saved game in slot {slot}.
